title: [Issue]: [HIP] Peer device memory access not available on dual GPU system
summary: On dual Radeon RX 9070 XT systems, hipDeviceCanAccessPeer reports no peer access even with Resizeable BAR enabled.
workaround: No confirmed workaround in issue; monitor upstream HIP peer-memory fixes and validate BIOS/ReBAR settings.

title: [CK] Smart-build CTest invocation can run more tests than were built, causing spurious "Not Run" CI failures
summary: Composable Kernel smart-build CI can schedule tests that were never built, producing false CI failures.
workaround: Use exact-match test selection and keep build/test sets aligned until upstream CI logic is corrected.

title: [Issue]: MIOpen tests fails on therock gfx1151 Windows CI Test runners
summary: MIOpen test shards on gfx1151 Windows runners fail with output mismatches, timeouts, and unspecified launch failures.
workaround: Rerun affected shards in CI; issue is currently tracked as an upstream test reliability problem.

title: [Issue]: CI - Jenkins - rocDecode error resilience test failure
summary: rocDecode Jenkins resilience tests can hang the GPU and abort with decoder failures during CI.
workaround: No issue-specific workaround documented; treat as CI instability and inspect migrated rocDecode tracker context.

title: [Bug] CI Tests failing on multiple PR's
summary: AITer CI reports failures across multiple unrelated PRs, indicating a shared upstream CI instability rather than branch-local regressions.
workaround: Retry failing CI shards and isolate framework-devops failures from PR-local signal where possible.

title: [TRITON][CI] Fix `test_pa_decode.py` flakiness in `gfx942`
summary: A Triton paged-attention test shows flaky abort/fail behavior on MI325 gfx942 CI runners without code changes.
workaround: Rerun the affected Triton shard; upstream discussion suggests dedicated MI325 validation is needed for a durable fix.

title: Plugins not being loaded properly in gpu_triton in "community" docker images
summary: ROCm JAX community Docker images fail to load the GPU Triton plugin, making gpu_triton appear unavailable on MI300X systems.
workaround: Use the non-community ROCm JAX image or verify plugin packaging before relying on community tags.

title: test_amdsmi_query_helpers_do_not_manage_lifecycle fails in multi-rank CI
summary: An Iris vendor-library lifecycle unit test passes standalone but fails under the multi-rank distributed CI harness.
workaround: Run the test standalone for local validation; distributed CI behavior remains under upstream investigation.

title: [TheRock CI] upstream component testing run and failures blocks even though unrelated
summary: TheRock CI can be blocked by upstream component test failures that are unrelated to the downstream PR under review.
workaround: Treat unrelated upstream component failures as infrastructure issues and rerun or scope CI more narrowly where possible.

title: [hipother][Windows][BUG][Blocker] `HIP SDK` targeting `nvcc` is `ULTIMATELY` broken
summary: HIP SDK 7.2 on Windows shows widespread failures when targeting nvcc, with thousands of HIP-VS CI unit test failures reported.
workaround: Upstream notes local fixes in nvidia_hip_runtime_api.h, but no official packaged workaround is published yet.
